src: An ultra-lightweight Python interpreter that runs with only 4KB of RAM, zero dependencies. It is ready to use out of the box without any configuration required and easy to extend with C. Similar project: MicroPython, JerryScript.
ja: RAM 4KBのみで動作し、依存関係ゼロの超軽量Pythonインタープリター。設定不要ですぐに使えてCで簡単に拡張可能。類似プロジェクト: MicroPython、JerryScript
